trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 review highlights the two DOP varieties as the most authentic and high‑quality balsamic vinegars, providing clear criteria for choosing them.
